title: 20 TidyZ Heavy-Duty Rubble Sacks. Made from 100% Recycled Plastic. Extra Strong and Thick Builders Bags. For DIY Construction, Building Site Debris, Garden Waste. 32L Blue Waste Bags
features: EXTRA THICK HEAVY DUTY CONSTRUCTION - Professional grade rubble sacks made with extra thick recycled plastic for superior tear and puncture resistance. Perfect for sharp building debris, bricks, hardcore, aggregate, soil, and heavy garden waste without ripping.

100% RECYCLED & RECYCLABLE - Environmentally responsible choice for trade and DIY projects. Each 32L blue rubble bag is made from 100% recycled plastic and can be recycled again, reducing landfill waste while maintaining exceptional strength.

LARGE 32 LITRE CAPACITY - Generous size handles substantial loads while remaining manageable to carry and transport. Suitable for filling with rubble, broken tiles, gravel, sand, and other building materials. Fits standard waste collection requirements.

VERSATILE 20 PACK FOR ANY PROJECT - Ideal for builders, landscapers, and homeowners. Use for construction site waste, renovation debris, garden clearance, soil removal, concrete waste, plaster, wood offcuts, and general building materials. Perfect for skips or waste collection.

TRUSTED TIDYZ QUALITY - Reliable British brand delivering trade-quality waste solutions. These blue builders bags are designed for professional tradespeople and serious DIY enthusiasts who need dependable, strong sacks that won't let them down mid-job.
description: 20 TidyZ Heavy-Duty Rubble Sacks. Made from 100% Recycled Plastic. Extra Strong and Thick Builders Bags. For DIY Construction, Building Site Debris, Garden Waste. 32L Blue Bags These Extra Thick and Strong Rubble Sacks Bags are perfect for all your heavy-duty Home DIY, Industrial Strength for Home DIY - Renovation - Construction - Building - Trade - Garden . Roll of 20 bags / sacks with a 32L capacity - perfect for filling to the brim without being too heavy to carry or transport. Made with 100% High Quality Recycled Plastic and 100% Recyclable. We specialise in providing you with the optimum strength products at great prices!
